description: Policies addressing climate change, conservation, clean air and water, and environmental protection.
Access to affordable healthcare, public health systems, mental health services, and medical workforce issues.
Worker protections, unions, wages, workplace safety, and collective bargaining rights.
Public education funding, schools, teachers, higher education, and student support systems.
Access to abortion, contraception, maternal healthcare, and bodily autonomy.
Equal rights protections across race, gender, sexual orientation, and identity, including anti-discrimination policies.
Election integrity, voting access, campaign finance reform, and democratic participation.
Policies aimed at reducing gun violence, including background checks, safe storage, and firearm regulations.
Protections and pathways for immigrants, refugees, and inclusive community policies.
Affordable housing, tenant protections, zoning, and homelessness solutions.
Policing, incarceration, sentencing reform, and fair and equitable justice systems.
Income inequality, taxation, jobs, consumer protection, and economic opportunity.
Programs and protections for older adults, including Social Security, Medicare, and elder care.
Accessibility, inclusion, and rights for people with disabilities across all areas of life.
Support, benefits, and services for veterans and active-duty military families.
Humane treatment of animals, wildlife protection, and animal rights policies.
Policies affecting children, youth development, and long-term societal outcomes.
Transparency, accountability, anti-corruption, and effective governance.
Tribal sovereignty, land rights, cultural preservation, and policies affecting Indigenous communities.
